note: Sakura Hallway · emotional-narrative orchestration. world-agent is Layer 1 (narrative orchestrator): advances scenes and the timeline, voices Saya/Fumi/Senpai, calls heart to rule on affection, writes affection and memory back to npc + run_state. heart only makes the 'fluttering-heart' ruling and returns JSON, world-agent does the persisting. No combat, no dice.

agents.name: Narrator
agents.role: Layer 1 — narrative orchestrator: scene/timeline advancement + writing back affection and memory + voicing the characters
agents.description: Advances the cherry-blossom-season timeline (the speed of falling petals), voices Saya, Fumi, and Senpai, calls heart on every meaningful player word or action to rule on affection changes, **writes the new affection and that line back to game/npc/<id>.json, and updates run_state (day / petals remaining / focus character)**, one beat then stop to wait for the player. All player input passes through it first.

agents.name: Heart (Affection Arbiter)
agents.description: Given a player line/action and a target character, combined with that character's personality and current affection, returns one structured 'fluttering-heart' ruling JSON: affection change (delta), whether a milestone is reached, a one-line internal reason. Never writes prose, never writes files (world-agent persists affection/memory). Temp 0.4.
